name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers - There are two ways to run a campaign in a post-Citizens United world.
The first is one that many politicians know well: courting millionaires and billionaires for very big checks, constantly holding big fundraising events, and ending up beholden to your donors. This method now also means being OK with super PACs.
The other way is quite different, and honestly, much more difficult. But it's the path we chose, and we believe it's the right path.
No super PACs. No billionaire class waiting to step in and save us. What we have is millions of people willing to stand together and say ENOUGH is ENOUGH. Our movement has made more than 4 million individual contributions to this effort, at an average of about $27 apiece.
**Tomorrow night's FEC fundraising deadline might be the biggest yet of our campaign. If you can, we need you to stand with Bernie.**
**[Make a $2.70 contribution to Bernie 2016 before Monday night's deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/not-the-billionaires?refcode=em160228pm-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/not-the-billionaires?refcode=em160228pm-full")**
You are a part of something that is unprecedented. We're so glad to have you at our side.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/not-the-billionaires?refcode=em160228pm-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/not-the-billionaires?refcode=em160228pm-full")**

name: Ben Carson
subject: Urgent: We can't afford to come up short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33856159:WnuUAoCNH:m:1:876315805:5E004BC0D18CBB3F27F7969565EFE41A:r)
---

Peter,

I have a simple but urgent request as we approach Super Tuesday on March 1st.

Right now, we don't have the resources we need to compete in all 12 of the states set to vote.

**This is our opportunity to break through and simply put, we can't afford come up short.**

[**Will you make an emergency donation of just $12? That's one dollar for each Super Tuesday state and it will be a huge boost to our grassroots teams on the ground.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33856159:WnuUAoCNH:m:1:876315805:5E004BC0D18CBB3F27F7969565EFE41A:r)

I believe that voters in Alabama, Alaska, Arkansas, Georgia, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Texas, Vermont, Virginia and Wyoming deserve a real choice.

Voters are not commodities to be bought and bartered in the backrooms of D.C.'s exclusive political clubs, but that's the way they're being treated every time the pundits call for someone to drop out or salivate over the latest polling percentages. It's wrong, and it's driving voters away from our political system.

I intend to offer the people a different choice from the other candidates, one they deserve to be able to make for themselves, as they support the principles in which they really believe.

I refuse to listen as the pundits and politicians decree from on high. I refuse to play by Washington's political rule book, or subjugate myself to the whims of the political class.

This undoubtedly puts us at a disadvantage, but that's just fine. To me, honesty and integrity are much more important than any political title, and I believe that most people still agree with that.

[**So please, help ensure that we have the resources to fully compete on Super Tuesday by making a small emergency donation of $12. I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important.
**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33856159:WnuUAoCNH:m:1:876315805:5E004BC0D18CBB3F27F7969565EFE41A:r)
Thank you for your support.

Ben Carson

name: Rand Paul
subject: I have a question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Patriot:

Do you think we should be selling arms to a
country contributing to terrorism?

I certainly don't. And if we don't stop
selling arms to Pakistan, that's exactly what we are doing.

We know that while we give billions of
dollars in aid to Pakistan and sell them American arms, they are
assisting the Afghan Taliban through their intelligence and
military.

This threatens American lives at home and
abroad.

I think it's about time we draw a line and
stand strong against the sale of arms to Pakistan.
I've introduced a bill that would halt sale
of military technology to the government of Pakistan until their
less-than-reliable status as an "ally" has been corrected. Will
you stand with me on this?
In addition to Pakistan's failure to prevent
the funding of terrorism, it also has a deplorable human rights
record.
Pakistan isolates and unjustly jails
religious minorities and Christians all too often.
In fact, Pakistani Asa Bibi was sentenced to
death for being a Christian. On top of that, they currently hold
Dr. Shakil Afridi in prison for his assistance to the United
States in locating and killing Osama Bin Laden.
Do you think this is really a foreign
government worthy of benefitting from American military
technology, Patriot?

I'm standing strong in the Senate to halt
U.S. arm sales to Pakistan.

This is just common sense legislation. We
need to stop selling the weapons foreign governments use to
support terrorist efforts.
We need to stop contributing to the economy
and the military of a countries that do not represent our best
interests.
Sign my petition today if you stand with me.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

---
Friend,

I have never needed you more than I do today.

**I'm still short $167,000, and I face two HUGE deadlines today** \-- the Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline is at midnight TONIGHT, and just hours after that, Super Tuesday votes will be cast.

You have done so much to help already, Friend (thank you!), but this is the ultimate test of our 2016 Presidential Campaign, and I am counting on your support right now.

[**_That is why I'm asking for your IMMEDIATE response to my message and for you to make an emergency FEC/Super Tuesday contribution of $35, $50, $250, or more today._**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33859879:s43qVoCON:m:1:1104269936:68EC421547B7AF6258771259BC9EE407:r)

Not only do we need the resources to turn out every vote we can tomorrow, but also posting a strong FEC report would be a HUGE boost for our campaign.

If our fundraising is not as strong as we need it to be -- Washington insiders will use whatever they can against us to ensure a true conservative has no chance to win.

Friend, the bottom line is this -- a grassroots campaign like ours cannot afford any setbacks in a race this tight. **So, I must turn to you for immediate financial help at this critical moment.**

I know I've asked a lot of you over the last few days...and I didn't want to have to do this, [**but I must ask one more time for your support of $35 or whatever you can afford.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33859879:s43qVoCON:m:1:1104269936:68EC421547B7AF6258771259BC9EE407:r)

There is good news: we are within striking distance of Trump in several key Super Tuesday states -- and we lead in Texas.

**But we cannot afford to let up just hours short of two of the BIGGEST deadlines for our campaign.**

[**I understand that money is tight and that you can't make up the whole shortfall, but can I count on you to make a special, EMERGENCY contribution of $50, $35, or even $5?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33859879:s43qVoCON:m:1:1104269936:68EC421547B7AF6258771259BC9EE407:r)

I need you to make sure that our hard work and the hard work of all our dedicated volunteers is not wasted on March 1st.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. Time is critical! I cannot overstate how important it is that we post strong fundraising numbers! [**The deadline is just hours away. So please, don't delay -- make an EMERGENCY contribution of $35, $50, $250, or more now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33859879:s43qVoCON:m:1:1104269936:68EC421547B7AF6258771259BC9EE407:r)

Courageous Conservatives \- Reigniting the Promise of America
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857094:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)
**Hello Friend,**
It's almost here -- **[Super Tuesday](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857094:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)**. From the very beginning of this campaign, our goal was to do well in the first four primary states and then take that momentum into the "SEC Primary" states that vote on Super Tuesday. Because of you, we've accomplished the first half of that goal, but now **[we need your help in phase two](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857094:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)**.
If you live in one of the Super Tuesday states, **[get a head start by committing to #ChooseCruz on Tuesday here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857094:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)**. Once you have done that, please spread the word on **[Facebook](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857095:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)** and **[Twitter](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857096:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)**. And even if you don't live in a Super Tuesday state, I'm certain you know people who do. Please call, text, email, or talk to everyone you know and encourage them to **[commit to #ChooseCruz and then turn out to vote on Tuesday, March 1st](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857094:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)**.
Ted Cruz has proven that he will stand up for the American people and fight back against the Washington Cartel, and that is one of the primary reasons you're backing him. **Without Marco Rubio in the race, Ted Cruz wins. Without Ted Cruz in the race, Donald Trump wins. It 's really as simple as that.**
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857097:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)
And as Rush Limbaugh [observed](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857098:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r), Ted Cruz has fought back against the Washington Establishment while Donald Trump helped grow the problem by donating to it. Additionally, we simply cannot afford to nominate a candidate who holds virtually indistinguishable policies from those of Hillary Clinton or Bernie Sanders. We need a Republican nominee who offers a bold contrast.
Just in case anyone you know needs any extra convincing, former General Electric CEO Jack Welch makes an impassioned case for why everyone should vote for Ted. I'd encourage you [watch this video and share it with anyone and everyone who may be on the fence](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857099:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r):
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857100:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)
If you tuned in to the CNN #GOPDebate in Houston, you saw [Ted lay out his positive, optimistic agenda for America](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857101:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r). It will be an America with more jobs, freedom, and security. If you missed the debate or would like to watch any of the highlights again, **[please click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857101:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r)**. After tomorrow, it will be more obvious than ever that **there are only two candidates with a path to the Republican nomination -- Donald Trump and Ted Cruz**.
The coalition of supporters we have built together simply won't support an establishment candidate such as Marco Rubio. As you know, he led the Gang of Eight and the fight to pass amnesty despite telling voters he opposed amnesty in his 2010 run for the Senate.
**Americans are hungry for a president who does exactly what he says -- not one who has already betrayed their trust.** In Ted Cruz, we have something extremely rare -- a candidate who actually keeps the promises he makes to voters and someone who is leading in fight after fight on all the issues important to conservatives.
As we head into Super Tuesday, we're in a great position. Last week, Ted received the [endorsement of the highly popular Texas Governor Greg Abbott](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857102:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r), and in the latest polling, **Ted leads in his home state of Texas by 15 points**. For comparison, **Marco Rubio trails in his home state of Florida by 16 points**!
We're also in second place in the delegate count with a large number up for grabs tomorrow. Over 200,000 of you have signed up to [volunteer](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33857103:skudvoCNG:m:1:1104269936:314AA1F4DDE00667E803090A0287470B:r) with our campaign, and we are organized in all 50 states, 5 territories, and the District of Columbia that send delegates to the convention.
I want to thank you for everything you've done so far. We wouldn't be where we are today without your help, but now is when the pedal hits the metal. Let's make Super Tuesday a "super Cruzday" and take that momentum forward to win the nomination and take back the White House!
To victory,
**Jeff Roe**
**Campaign Manager**
**Cruz for President**

name: Tyler Foote
subject: reclaim freedom
body:
Hey Peter, Today the Senate Appropriations Committee is taking up legislation to expand your freedom to rent your property as you see fit - and take advantage of good lodging offered by your neighbors.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Hey Peter,

In a few hours the Senate Appropriations Committee will decide if you have the freedom to rent your property or enjoy lodging offered by your neighbors. **[Tell your](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=cb087649b09c7758bcb9f10d237df53d97d4dcfddb80d9af02becd8fd73c750f79b6916a1b6238b2 "Click here")** lawmakers to support SB 416 and reclaim our property rights! SB 416 will stop the busy-body bureaucrats who want to tell you how and whether you can use your private property as part of the sharing economy. My staff and I are barn-storming the capitol right now on your behalf in support of this bill. Will you help us connect with more lawmakers and win the vote for property rights and freedom?[ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=cb087649b09c77587c6478fd7c56e810c2fe0a5900817f3cd6e57b110f4360b12e3cb502ab24d6d2)If you've used services like AirBnB and VRBO, you know why having more freedom to rent a home in Virginia could be great for our economy and for travelers.It's time to take back our private property from the meddling bureaucrats and advance commonsense deregulation. [Click here](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=cb087649b09c7758bcb9f10d237df53d97d4dcfddb80d9af02becd8fd73c750f79b6916a1b6238b2 "Click here") to tell your lawmakers to support SB 416. Let's take back our private property rights!Sincerely,

Tyler Foote
VA State Director
Americans for ProsperityP.S. Even if you haven't stayed in an AirBnB or VRBO home, current restrictions set a dangerous precedent over who can regulate what we do with our own property. Let's [win this legislative fight](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=cb087649b09c7758576fe9b012191d163960e49ab57b544a4e8cbc4e02543b5d7e20f0ac9fbc9df8 "win this legislative fight") and keep Virginia for freedom-lovers.

subject: Let's try something a bit wild

body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Today is one of the most important days of our campaign: the final FEC fundraising deadline before Super Tuesday. Let me tell you why this matters.
Eleven states vote tomorrow, and twelve more vote over the next two weeks. It is the most important stretch of our campaign. And what today's deadline will tell us is whether or not working people coming together and contributing small amounts of money can compete with the millionaires and billionaires bankrolling Hillary Clinton's campaign and her largest super PACs.
So I have a wild idea: **I want to challenge you to help our campaign hit a goal that will absolutely astonish the political and financial establishment of this country.** It's a bit of a stretch, but it's within the spirit of this campaign to accomplish what everyone else thinks is impossible. So here it goes:
[**Make a $2.70 contribution to our campaign and help us hit our goal of raising $40 million in February before tonight 's critical FEC fundraising deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-goal?refcode=em160229am-v2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-goal?refcode=em160229am-v2-full")

subject: FW: Help!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
If you haven't already, read his email below -- then make a last minute financial commitment to his campaign. |

Friend,

I just got Senator Cruz's email below.

I know what it is like to run a campaign and be just hours away from a critical deadline. But this one is certainly the most important deadline yet for Senator Cruz's campaign...

That's why I'm forwarding you his email and asking personally for your help.

_Senator Cruz is a man of principle who will lead our country with with two checklists guiding his every decision -- the Bible and the United States Constitution._

He is on pace to secure the Republican nomination, **but Senator Cruz can't do it without your help.**

If you haven't already, read his email below -- [**then make a last-minute financial commitment to his campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33866706:WbGXxoCkN:m:1:1104269936:D5C8FB35E1F1C4DE870BE109EA4ACAE3:r)

A donation made before Super Tuesday is the single most impactful action you can take to help elect Senator Cruz the next President of the United States.

[**Click here to donate.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33866706:WbGXxoCkN:m:1:1104269936:D5C8FB35E1F1C4DE870BE109EA4ACAE3:r)

Thanks for what you're doing.

Governor Rick Perry

\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---
From: [ted@tedcruz.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33866706:WbGXxoCkN:m:1:1104269936:D5C8FB35E1F1C4DE870BE109EA4ACAE3:r)
Sent: Monday, February 29th
To: Governor Rick Perry
Subject: Help!
---|---
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33866706:WbGXxoCkN:m:1:1104269936:D5C8FB35E1F1C4DE870BE109EA4ACAE3:r)
---
Governor Rick Perry,

I have never needed you more than I do today.

**I'm still short $167,000, and I face two HUGE deadlines today** \-- the Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline is at midnight TONIGHT, and just hours after that, Super Tuesday votes will be cast.

You have done so much to help already, Governor Rick Perry (thank you!), but this is the ultimate test of our 2016 Presidential Campaign, and I am counting on your support right now.

[**_That is why I'm asking for your IMMEDIATE response to my message and for you to make an emergency FEC/Super Tuesday contribution of $35, $50, $250, or more today._**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33866706:WbGXxoCkN:m:1:1104269936:D5C8FB35E1F1C4DE870BE109EA4ACAE3:r)

Not only do we need the resources to turn out every vote we can tomorrow, but also posting a strong FEC report would be a HUGE boost for our campaign.

If our fundraising is not as strong as we need it to be -- Washington insiders will use whatever they can against us to ensure a true conservative has no chance to win.

Governor Rick Perry, the bottom line is this -- a grassroots campaign like ours cannot afford any setbacks in a race this tight. **So, I must turn to you for immediate financial help at this critical moment.**

I know I've asked a lot of you over the last few days...and I didn't want to have to do this, [**but I must ask one more time for your support of $35 or whatever you can afford.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33866706:WbGXxoCkN:m:1:1104269936:D5C8FB35E1F1C4DE870BE109EA4ACAE3:r)

There is good news: we are within striking distance of Trump in several key Super Tuesday states -- and we lead in Texas.

**But we cannot afford to let up just hours short of two of the BIGGEST deadlines for our campaign.**

[**I understand that money is tight and that you can't make up the whole shortfall, but can I count on you to make a special, EMERGENCY contribution of $50, $35, or even $5?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33866706:WbGXxoCkN:m:1:1104269936:D5C8FB35E1F1C4DE870BE109EA4ACAE3:r)

I need you to make sure that our hard work and the hard work of all our dedicated volunteers is not wasted on March 1st.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. Time is critical! I cannot overstate how important it is that we post strong fundraising numbers! [**The deadline is just hours away. So please, don't delay -- make an EMERGENCY contribution of $35, $50, $250, or more now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33866706:WbGXxoCkN:m:1:1104269936:D5C8FB35E1F1C4DE870BE109EA4ACAE3:r)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: A personal note from Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Friend, I want you to know that no matter what is thrown our way or what the media says about our campaign, I will never give up on our values and beliefs. |
---
Friend,

It's hard to believe that Super Tuesday is just a day away. I want you to know our campaign isn't going anywhere but the White House next January.

I know this campaign has not been easy, and the road ahead won't be either. Yet, I know and believe that together we are going to win the Republican nomination and go on to win the general election!

But in order to get there I need your continued help. I know I've asked a lot of you, but [**if I can count on you in these final hours before Super Tuesday, please let me know by making an urgent contribution right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33867983:WropRoCwN:m:1:1284014958:1CFAAF8B7B7EDC96FE527F9B908282AE:r)

| [** DONATE BEFORE TUESDAY >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33867983:WropRoCwN:m:1:1284014958:1CFAAF8B7B7EDC96FE527F9B908282AE:r)
---

Unfortunately my opponents have resorted to dirty politicking and many attacks have been thrown at my family and our supporters.

**Friend, I want you to know that no matter what is thrown our way or what the media says about our campaign, I will never give up on our values and beliefs.

And I will always remember -- focused as I am right now on winning -- that my most important job will always be as a husband and father, and that the goal of all our lives is eternity, not some political fight. Even in the most intense moments, you can always count on me to remember that. **

This election has not been easy, and I know the road ahead won't be either. But I know that the things worth fighting for aren't always easy, and that's why I'm so dedicated to this campaign and our conservative message.

**[I hope I can continue to count on your support before Tuesday.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33867983:WropRoCwN:m:1:1284014958:1CFAAF8B7B7EDC96FE527F9B908282AE:r) **

Thanks,

Marco Rubio
Republican Candidate for President

**P.S.[Friend, I wouldn't be able to carry on with this campaign if it weren't for you and your support.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33867983:WropRoCwN:m:1:1284014958:1CFAAF8B7B7EDC96FE527F9B908282AE:r) Thank you for being a committed supporter and a loyal friend. Thank you for standing by our campaign even when the going got tough. Thank you for your commitment to restoring our nation. **

[** DONATE BEFORE TUESDAY >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33867983:WropRoCwN:m:1:1284014958:1CFAAF8B7B7EDC96FE527F9B908282AE:r)
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Winning back the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend --

Katie is a dedicated Democrat, an incredible leader, and she continuously fights for the middle class. And one more thing: Katie needs your help.

We would be lucky to have Katie McGinty in the U.S. Senate for the next six years. But she's up against a Republican opponent with his hand in the deep pockets of corporations across the country. And that's where you come in.

[**Will you join the fight to win back the Senate and donate $5 to support Katie McGinty?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6793719736271110144/-7808656813674463232?refcode=e20160229&refcode2=e20160229nd&amount=25)

I know we're all joined around one goal for the next election: to keep Republicans from running the Senate and build a government we can believe in -- a government that will stand up for families, for women's health care, and for progress.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Trump’s worst con of all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46416885:JIxHYXraN:m:1:1349778030:295F1DFD0CE097E1DFC1144C03F3508C:r)
---
| | | | Peter, If you've followed the news this past week, you've probably seen me make the case that Donald Trump is a con-man -- and that he's an insecure, ridiculous character who doesn't stand a chance against Hillary Clinton in the general election. We know this partly because he has a record of talking a big game and then ripping off ordinary Americans. But we also know it because he has offered absolutely no real ideas about how he'll actually "make America great again." He pretty much just wants you to take a known con man at his word. Meanwhile, I've spent fifteen years working on the challenges that face working Americans, coming up with conservative solutions, and making those solutions law. That's the core of what I'm running on **[this campaign](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46416886:JIxHYXraN:m:1:1349778030:295F1DFD0CE097E1DFC1144C03F3508C:r).** Let's run through some of those ideas -- and Donald's empty promises: **Taxes:** My tax plan will do more for working families than the plan of anyone else in the field. It will help Americans pay for the steep cost of raising kids by increasing the child tax credit substantially, and it will eliminate the marriage penalty. I also want to make low-paid work more attractive to the unemployed by modernizing and reforming the earned-income tax credit, so that taking a job that pays higher wages won't reduce what hard-working Americans take home in pay. On top of that, I'll cut taxes for small businesses, so they're not paying more than big corporations. Estimates show that my plan will grow the economy and increase investment far more than Donald's, boost wages almost twice as much, and do more for middle-class families. **Health Care:** You may have seen the stark contrast on this important issue at the debate the other night: Donald went on and on about getting rid of "lines around the states," how "terrific" his plan would be, and how he'd fight for Americans against insurers. I actually led the successful effort to block a huge bailout of insurance companies that President Obama tried to use to save ObamaCare -- so I know a lot about this, and have actually delivered a result that protects taxpayers. We do need to increase competition, but we also need to provide Americans with the resources (via a refundable tax credit) to buy the kind of insurance they want, and we need to increase flexibility in programs like Medicaid, too. No one else in the Republican field has actually worked on figuring out how to replace ObamaCare with something better like I have. **Veterans:** Donald talks about how much he helps veterans (though he's notoriously not followed through on promises of donations), but I've actually done it. After the VA scandals in recent years, I went into the VA reform fight with a couple simple principles: VA employees who are failing our veterans should be fired, and vets should be able to take their benefits wherever they want. I managed to get a major victory on one of those -- senior VA executives can now be fired thanks to the proposal I introduced -- but I have more plans to make sure our vets have the options they deserve and to ensure that the VA is held accountable. **Social Security:** Donald's promise to protect Social Security is about as reliable as an investment in a Trump casino. On its current course, Social Security will go bankrupt and not be able to fulfill the promises we have made. I don't support doing anything that would hurt current beneficiaries like my mother, and I support strengthening the program for low-income seniors today and boosting incomes for seniors who want to work. But for future beneficiaries like me, the program will have to look a little different: I might have to work a year or two longer than my parents did in order to save our safety net. These are not unreasonable changes. Anyone promising they'll keep Social Security the same forever is promising abrupt benefit cuts due to bankruptcy. (Which I suppose is no surprise coming from Donald.) **Higher Education:** I'm not sure I've ever heard Donald talk about how he'll help Americans learn new skills after getting a high school degree -- at least since he stopped trying to sell them on Trump University. But that's the key to getting good-paying jobs, and it's increasingly too hard or too expensive to get new skills or post-high-school training. That's why I have put forward sensible proposals to break up the cartel of our overpriced colleges and universities, help Americans access vocational education they need, and help new graduates manage their loan payments. Donald says he's going to fight for working Americans, but all he's done is trick thousands of Americans into going into debt to pay for a phony education and worthless degree. I'm the only candidate who's actually laid out how to help Americans get a college education or new certifications and skills they need at an affordable price. **Jobs:** Donald says that he'll be just a "terrific" jobs president, but this is just another empty promise -- he's offered next to no specifics about how he'd do it. Besides my tax plan to boost growth and take-home pay, I've laid out ideas to restrain regulations that are holding back hiring, tap into America's energy potential, empower workers rather than union bosses, spur innovations from the sharing economy, and help Americans get the education they need to get to hold down good-paying jobs. No matter what Donald says, the president does not create jobs -- the president creates the conditions for the private sector to create jobs, and my plans would go a long way in that direction. That's not all -- there's a lot more on energy production, more school choice and eliminating Washington mandates in K-12 education, tech policy, and other issues. You don't hear about it every day on cable TV, but our ideas for restoring American prosperity, helping working families, and rebuilding the American Dream are second to none. If you want a candidate who has serious plans to solve the problems that face America -- not the same old talking points or Donald's empty bluster -- [**go here to support my campaign right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46416886:JIxHYXraN:m:1:1349778030:295F1DFD0CE097E1DFC1144C03F3508C:r) While we've been working on ideas like these, Donald Trump was playing a businessman on TV and (maybe) managing his private club in Palm Beach that hires foreign workers instead of the Americans that applied. The choice is pretty clear. I get that Americans want someone to fight for them -- that's what I've been hearing on the campaign trail this whole year. But Donald is so far from being someone who can do that. I've been fighting for the kind of new ideas that will help working Americans prosper again for years now, and I'll keep doing it. [**Help me go fight for them in the White House.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46416886:JIxHYXraN:m:1:1349778030:295F1DFD0CE097E1DFC1144C03F3508C:r) Sincerely, Marco Rubio

body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Here is the truth at the heart of this campaign: we will never be able to change a corrupt political system by taking its money.
Hillary Clinton receives a tremendous amount of money from Wall Street. This morning, Christine from Brookline, Massachusetts contributed $3 to our political revolution because she's had enough of billionaires buying elections. Health care and pharmaceutical companies have contributed millions of dollars to the Clinton campaigns. Thomas, a laid-off welder from Ohio with no health care contributed a few bucks because he believes in Bernie.
On the surface it might not seem like a fair fight, but when people come together anything is possible. And the response since Bernie's challenge to help our campaign raise $40 million in the month of February has been incredible. [**These are all real contributions from people helping us reach our goal. Add yours before our midnight FEC fundraising deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-goal?refcode=em160229am2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-goal?refcode=em160229am2-full")

With Super Tuesday tomorrow, we are entering the most important stretch of this campaign. Our opponent's largest super PAC has really stepped up their spending after receiving more than $15 million in Wall Street money during their final fundraising report of 2015.
But what we are going to demonstrate in this election is that their enormous wealth and power is their weakness. When we hit our goal tonight, we are going to send a powerful message to those who have yet to vote that we have what it takes to defeat the billionaire class in this election. That's why we have to ask:
[**Can Bernie count on you to make a $2.70 contribution for the final FEC fundraising deadline before Super Tuesday? You can do that here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-goal?refcode=em160229am2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-goal?refcode=em160229am2-full")

In solidarity,

name: Marco Rubio
subject: before you go to bed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Friend, before I go to bed I just wanted to write you this quick email. |
---
Friend, before you go to bed, I just wanted to thank you for taking this journey with me.

Tomorrow is a big day, no matter what happens. Our campaign is going to win this election, because we have the most important factor: YOU.

It is because of you that we have gotten this far, and it is because of you and your network of friends and family that we are going to win this election.

Friend, I know you know that this is not just an election, this is about the future of our nation. Making sure we don't have a President Trump or President Clinton is the incredibly important task before us.

If I can count on you again tonight, will you please go to this link right now: **[marcorubio.com/supertuesday](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33870504:s_WTrVCaN:m:1:1284014958:A66B714D726149EC90325D926738423C:r)**?

Campaigning is not easy, but fighting for our country and our children and grandchildren's future is worth every attack and slander I've faced. You can count on me that I will NEVER waver from my conservative values and stop fighting.

My opponents -- Donald Trump, Ted Cruz, and the Democrats -- have spread vicious lies about our campaign while continuing to run their negative and dirty campaigns.

It's support from people like you that have gotten us this far, and it is your continued support that will fuel us to victory. Again, here's the link to chip in: **[marcorubio.com/supertuesday](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33870504:s_WTrVCaN:m:1:1284014958:A66B714D726149EC90325D926738423C:r)**.

My family and I thank you for your prayers and kindness. Tomorrow's a big day!

Thanks,
Marco

name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: [Goal Update] Here's where we are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
We're more than halfway through the final day of our critical fundraising deadline, but we're still short of hitting our ambitious goal. Will we make it? That's up to you.
But let me tell you this: Bernie Sanders doesn't go around asking for contributions from millionaires and billionaires. **If we 're going to reach our goal and have the resources we need to win on Super Tuesday and in the dozen primaries and caucuses over the following weeks, it's going to come from working people coming together to give what they can in small amounts.**
That's how this campaign is funded, and it happens largely in response to emails like this one. That's why I have to ask directly: Can Bernie count on you to contribute $2.70 before midnight tonight? You can do that here:
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/our-goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-goal?refcode=em160229pm-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-goal?refcode=em160229pm-full")
Ninety-six percent of the pledged delegates are still up for grabs in this primary, with many of them awarded over the next month. That's why this goal is so important. If everyone who has signed up to support Bernie contributes today, we're going to have what we need to win.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager

If everyone who has signed up to support Bernie contributes today, we're going to have what we need to win. In solidarity, Jeff Weaver Campaign Manager Bernie 2016 "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

body:

---

Peter, As Black History Month ends, I want you to know why I believe black lives matter: not just for the African-American as an individual, but for all of us. Over half America's children under the age of three are children of color. If they don't "make it," we all don't make it. So please watch the short video below, then support me to help bring about "the more perfect union" our founding fathers envisioned -- where we all might benefit from each individual's achievement. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171968f/3476a20e/c51d95e/274511b7/66971295/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0229FBBLMb1&amounts=20,50,75,150,250,500,1000")
